text: Could you repeat that, please?

David arrives at the AeroBras office. Karina welcomes him and introduces her colleague. She presents the company. David asks about prices. They plan the next meeting.
Welcome to AeroBras!
This is my colleague, Paulo.
I have ten years of experience.
We offer excellent service.
It is a pleasure to have you here.
My name is Karina Macedo.
How much does this aircraft cost?
Here is my business card.
Welcome to AeroBras.
How much does it cost?
Nice to meet you. Here is my business card.
I work for AeroBras.
I am from São Paulo, Brazil.
I work in the aviation business.
It costs four million dollars.
The price is two million dollars.
We can offer a discount.
We have partners in many countries.
We deliver worldwide.
Where are you from?
What do you do?
Who do you work for?

Hello Karina, this is David Miller, from Maple Air. Thank you for the invitation. I am at the hotel now. I arrive at your office at ten o'clock. I want to see your company and talk about the prices. See you soon!

Good morning, and welcome! My name is Laura Costa. I am from Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. I am a businesswoman in aviation, and I have ten years of experience. My company buys and sells aircraft. We have partners in many countries. We offer excellent service, and we deliver worldwide. Thank you for your visit!
Good morning! It is great to see you again, Karina.
Good morning, David! Welcome to AeroBras. How are you?
I am very well, thank you. Your office is beautiful.
Thank you! This is my colleague, Paulo. He is our sales manager.
Nice to meet you, Paulo. So, Karina, tell me about your company.
Of course. We buy and sell aircraft. We have partners in many countries.
Excellent. And what services do you offer?
We offer sales, delivery, and maintenance. Our team is excellent.
Perfect. How much does the small jet cost?
It costs four million dollars. For you, we can offer a discount.
Great! I am very interested. AeroBras is a serious company.
Thank you, David. It is a pleasure to have you here.
